diff: - extra in embed      tasks/061_001_parallel_map_with_concurrency_limit_02/prompt.md:187:   # The recursive scheduling loop. Awaits one finished task at a time,
- extra in embed      tasks/061_001_parallel_map_with_concurrency_limit_02/prompt.md:188:   # records its outcome by original index, frees its slot, and refills that
- extra in embed      tasks/061_001_parallel_map_with_concurrency_limit_02/prompt.md:189:   # slot from the queue until nothing is running and nothing is queued.
